case_title: BALWANT D THAKOR VS. ROBERT A MCADAMS

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THAKOR, BALWANT D AS TO DEFENDANT MCADAMS, ROBERT A SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
